\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5725 introduces Tidimensionalresonancegyromagneticuniverse Propagator Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \mathbf{G} &= \nabla \times \mathbf{A}_g, \\ \mathbf{D}_g &= -\nabla \Phi_g - \partial_t \mathbf{A}_g. \end{align}
